name: evolving-pipeline
description: Static Evolving Pipeline quotation app with Supabase-backed storage.

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');fs.mkdirSync('public',{recursive:true});for(const f of ['index.html','config.js','supabase-setup.sql'])if(fs.existsSync(f))fs.copyFileSync(f,path.join('public',f));console.log('Built static app into public/')"
